cards.name: 9 of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: rewarded efforts, success, achievement, independence, leisure, material security, self-sufficiency

cards.name: Ace of Wands
cards.interpretation: inspiration, creative spark, new initiative, new passion, enthusiasm, energy

cards.name: Ⅲ The Empress, reversed
cards.interpretation: insecurity, overbearing, negligence, smothering, lack of growth, lack of progress
